---
title: "rxsim Gallery"
listing:
  contents: examples
  type: grid
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  image-placeholder: assets/img/logo.svg
---

Worked examples demonstrating rxsim's core features for simulating clinical trials — from a simple two-arm t-test to seamless adaptive designs with Bayesian borrowing.

For concepts and API, see the [rxsim documentation](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim).
